title: Data Architect
description: Senior role responsible for translating business requirements into technology requirements and designing an organization’s enterprise data management framework, including standards, processes, and ...

definitions.definition: Senior role responsible for translating business requirements into technology requirements and designing an organization’s enterprise data management framework, including standards, processes, and vocabulary.
definitions.sources:
- DAMA International’s Guide to the Data Management Body of Knowledge (DAMA-DMBOK2)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
